title: Minecraft PS2
description: "Found recently in a [garage sale]. Probably from 2007? 08?"
body:
"surprisingly good condition. minecraft!"

Ah, Minecraft! The PC classic, ported to the PS2. By 4J no less! It has to be good, right?

Wait. The PS2? There wasn't even a Wii port but the PS2?? You don't even remember where it's from, but what the hey? It's just a game...

Click for details

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

(Fullscreen the window or resize it to 640x480 for the full experience!)

A "port" of the [Minecraft PSX](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/mcsx-minecraft-ps1-edition) game for the PS2.

- From the Fog is installed (or else it'd just be a snooze fest.)
- 2D Items in hand and floor.
- Render fog.
- The dark is **pitch black.**
- Using the Programmer Art+ Texture Pack.
- I could list a lot more but i'll not spoil them.

This is a MultiMC instance as much as it is a Modrinth instance. I recommend MultiMC/Prism because there are a lot of configurable things. a. lot.

</details>
